## 1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

The company is **operationally healthy but pre-revenue**. The agent fleet has built a large, ready-to-sell inventory (12 digital products, 24 articles, 8 staged Fiverr gigs, 4 platform listing packages) at **zero human cash investment**, and is holding a flat, sub-cap burn. **$0 has been collected** because every revenue-collection path is gated behind founder-owned accounts (Gumroad publish, GitHub Sponsors enable, Fiverr seller account, Medium enroll). This is the single dominant risk and is **not** a build or burn problem — it is a **distribution / founder-publish gate** problem.

| Headline | Value |
|---|---|
| Target MRR | **₹5,00,000 / mo** (~$6,024/mo @ ₹83/USD) |
| Actual MRR (realized) | **₹0 / $0** |
| Projected best-case MRR (M4, agent-derived) | ~$5,600/mo ≈ ₹4.65L (≈93% of target, still unmet) |
| Human-owned burn | **₹0** (policy-compliant) |
| Autonomous agent burn (tracked) | $70 MTD, $430/$500 cap remaining |
| Products built | 12 cataloged · 2 live · 10 staged on Gumroad |
| Platform listings staged | 4 (Gumroad, Fiverr, GitHub Sponsors, Medium) — **0 externally live** |
| Blocked revenue issues | 5 (PRE-52, PRE-55, PRE-57, PRE-51, PRE-53) |

## 5. REVENUE PROGRESS vs ₹5,00,000/mo TARGET

| Milestone | Subs target | MRR target | MRR actual | Builds tgt/act | Verdict |
|-----------|------------:|-----------:|-----------:|---------------:|---------|
| M1 | 5 | $245 (~₹20k) | $0 | 0/0 | Missed (gate) |
| M2 | 15 | ~$1,240 (~₹1.03L) | $0 | 1/0 | Missed (gate) |
| M3 | 35 | ~$3,200 (~₹2.66L) | $0 | 2/0 | Missed (gate) |
| M4 (derived) | ~60 | ~$5,600 (~₹4.65L) | $0 | 3/0 | Projected, short of ₹5L |

- **Actual realized revenue: ₹0 / $0** — confirmed in live ledger (`revenue/summary` → entryCount 0).
- **Gap to target:** 100% of the ₹5,00,000/mo target is unmet. Even the agent-derived M4 best case (~₹4.65L) lands at ~93% of target and is itself gated on the same founder publish actions.
- **Root cause (consistent across M1–M4):** every stream funnels through founder-owned, human-gated storefronts. The agent can *build and stage* autonomously but cannot *go live / collect payment* without Prem's login. Catalog grew 10→12, articles 3→24, yet **$0 booked**.

## 6. BURN RATE (should be ₹0)

- **Human-owned burn: ₹0 / $0** — ✅ policy-compliant. No ad spend, no paid tooling. Zero-investment model intact.
- **Autonomous agent burn (only tracked cost = OpenRouter model inference, tencent/hy3:free):**
  - Gross burn M-T-D: **$70.00** (7,000¢), 100% attributed to Hermes CMO.
  - Monthly budget cap: **$500** (hard-stop, calendar-month UTC).
  - Budget remaining: **$430** (14% used, 0 incidents).
  - Net burn M-T-D: **$70** (= gross, revenue $0).
  - Planning run-rate: **$6.02/day (~$183/mo)** — flat across M2→M3→M4 pulls; no new spend since 2026-07-12 process boot.
  - Runway to cap: ~71 days at current pace — cap will **not** be breached this month.
- **Net cash impact since launch:** **–$70.00** (cumulative burn $70, revenue $0). Breakeven requires ~4 retained $49 subscribers; covered the moment M2's 15-sub target is touched.

> Note: the $70 is autonomous-inference cost, not founder cash outlay. Under the zero-investment policy the **founder-facing burn is ₹0**. The $500/mo AI-inference cap is a soft operating guard, not external spend.

## 7. NEXT MOST VALUABLE ACTION (specific, actionable)

**Founder action — publish the 10 staged Gumroad paid products + enable the $49/mo subscription tier (unblocks PRE-52).**

- **Why:** This is the highest-leverage, lowest-effort move. The agent has already built and drafted all 12 products (2 free lead magnets already live). Flipping the 10 drafted paid products ($9–$29) + the subscription tier to "published" requires ~30 min of founder login time and converts the entire built catalog into a live, payment-collecting storefront. It directly attacks the dominant risk (distribution gate) and is the fastest path to first $49 subscribers and one-time sales.
- **Do not wait for:** Fiverr (PRE-55), GitHub Sponsors (PRE-57), or Medium (PRE-54) — those are secondary channels. Gumroad is the only path where the product is already staged AND free lead magnets are proven live.
- **Agent-side (already done / no action):** nothing further required from the fleet; the bottleneck is purely the founder publish click.

Secondary: once Gumroad is live, enable GitHub Sponsors (PRE-57, 5 tiers staged) and enroll Medium Partner (PRE-54) to add recurring + content revenue with near-zero marginal effort.

## 8. ISSUES NEEDING HUMAN ATTENTION (FOUNDER GATES)

These are **hard founder gates** the agent cannot cross (no login/credentials). Listed for Prem:

1. **PRE-52 — Gumroad store go-live** (BLOCKED). Log in, publish 10 drafted paid products + $49/mo subscription. → *Unlocks all digital-product revenue.*
2. **PRE-55 — Fiverr seller account + 5 gigs** (BLOCKED). Create/sign into Fiverr seller account; publish 2–3 of 8 staged gigs ($120–$1,500). → *Unlocks service revenue.*
3. **PRE-57 — GitHub Sponsors enable** (BLOCKED). Enable `github.com/sponsors/itsPremkumar`, activate 5 tiers. → *Recurring dev-audience revenue.*
4. **PRE-54 — Medium Partner Program** (in_review). Enroll + publish 4 staged articles. → *Content/passive revenue.*
5. **PRE-5 — Showcase repo / LinkedIn page** (in_review). Publish staged showcase + LinkedIn copy. → *Top-of-funnel for all of the above.*
6. **PRE-51 — Income-engine auto-publish** (BLOCKED). Founder authorizes the agent to publish affiliate blog/products, or publishes manually.
7. **Data gap (owner: founder):** supply a single `cash_balance` input so "runway in months" can be computed (today only runway-to-cap is reportable; `cashBalanceCents: null` in company record).
